Provided architectural direction and boundaries to compute capacity request board. Held monthly executive women’s working group to level the playing field at Oracle.

Lead a team of 130 technical, product management and user experience teams, transformed Avalara.com and the Martech infrastructure to enable rapid growth with strong technical discipline.

past.description:
Lead a team of 21:
o	Established a global campaign desk to consolidate and execute demand generation and acquisition activities with the field worldwide across display, syndicated, social, SEM, native. Built consistent global campaigns that executed locally, reduced cost of acquisition by 80% through targeting and channel optimization.
o	Established a team to consolidate 40+ web properties for technical audiences via a data driven and shared approach across the company, including audience marketing, engineering, product groups, operations, field and engineering. Led both platform and UX research and decisions. Increased audience satisfaction +12%.
o	Established a core team to drive SEO consolidation, simplifying experiences and growing organic traffic globally. Organic traffic +8% off an already high base.
o	Established a data and analytics team to track campaigns, customer journeys and UX effectiveness, providing the data and agility needed to continue optimizing demand generation, owned experiences, cross channel marketing. Created near real time multi-channel insights allowing fast optimization and cost savings.
o	Refined and rebuilt localization strategy for digital across 22 languages and 40 locales, bringing the publishing SLA down to 48 hours from 5 days, and the localization SLA to 3 days from 2 weeks. We met 99% of our SLA’s each week.
o	Transformed social channel business from a broadcast channel to a two-way channel leveraging influencers, key moments and data to give us reach into new communities. Built a digital influencer program that drove + 2 million additional impressions in social.

past.description:
Together with three partners, I founded Mint which grew to be a market leader in the web application, document management, enterprise content management and collaboration spheres.  Mint is recognized globally by Microsoft and is an active member of their partner advisory council for SharePoint technologies.
	
My responsibilities included:

•	Company strategy, direction, management of investors, financial reporting.  Assist in setting of budgets, creation of financial models and management of financial affairs of the company, including financial year end, tax and audits.
•	40 direct reports, including developers, project managers, sales, marketing and admin folk.
•	Business development, strategic partner development and management, customer acquisition and management – maintaining appropriate CxO relationships and ensuring strategic value.  Scale customer and partner management to sales team; implement CRM systems, metrics and measurement.
•	Sales strategy and management: Direct sales team to identify the right target customers.  Write technical sales documents, and manage document strategy, creation and templatization. Manage the sales team - targets and budgets, performance in respect of prospecting, pipelines, documents etc. Close strategic accounts - High level negotiation to close deals with senior decision makers, when a deal is at an advanced stage. Deals closed with: Ford Motor Company, Deloitte, Microsoft South Africa, Cell C and several other large companies. Grew sales from $0 to $4 Million.
•	Marketing strategy and management: Brand inventor, custodian and visionary.  Created brand, attitude, look, marketing materials, events, web presence etc.
•	Operational: optimize scope management, measurement of productivity and profitability.
•	I was instrumental in growing the company from scratch as a credible niche player in the enterprise market.  I Negotiated seed capital from Nous, and ultimate buyout of majority shareholding 3 years later.

-	Executed integrated segment specific campaigns by vertical as well as by company size: Account based for enterprise, content and industry targeting for SMB, broad marketing for consumer.  
-	Built and scaled outbound and inbound team from a pilot of 6 sales and marketing development reps to 70, covering all sales regions across the US.
-	Based on the success of the mid-market initiative, established enterprise SDR team, integrated with account-based efforts
-	Built vision for personalized, SEO optimized, accessible and differentiated web experience.  The new UX was released to market in September 2018.
-	Established User Experience vision and capability, taking design leadership and a journey view across all customer and prospect touch points to create consistency and reduce friction.
-	Established and developed reporting and insights for campaigns, UX, content, channel effectiveness allowing optimization across channels.

Key responsibilities and work underway:
	•	Evolving the digital experience and measurement foundation to support global growth
	•	Advancing how we use data and analytics to shape decisions, forecast outcomes, and improve accountability
	•	Introducing AI-enabled workflows across content, campaigns, reporting, and experimentation to increase speed and consistency
	•	Improving web experience, funnel performance, and digital channel efficiency
	•	Aligning people, systems, and operating rhythm around shared goals and clear governance
	•	Developing talent and operating mechanisms that help teams deliver faster with confidence and clarity

This role brings together strategy, execution, and enablement across the full digital and marketing operations landscape, with the goal of building a modern, scalable, efficient growth engine.

past.name: University of New Hampshire
past.title: Associate Director, Advancement Technology

past.description:
I represented our business consumers and delivered organized, actionable information from a variety of sources.  A bit more specifically, I served as product owner for our enterprise data products and led a number of scrums in the areas of Client Data, Analytics and Master Data Management (MDM).

Before that, I also directed the team responsible for data acquisition and integration across Group product revenue and the full lifecycle of Long Term Care information.  My team ranged from analyst to manager level, as well as our matrixed partners in the actuarial functions.  We delivered a data platform that allowed us to consolidate and streamline our recurring actuarial valuation processes for both active and claim business.  We enhanced our ability to reserve at a more granular level and automated processes that previously had large manual components.  We got more accurate and saved time.

I have also co-led an initiative to analyze and remedy premium leakage, bringing together analytics, process analysis and team-building to get at the root causes.  Our small pilot led to significant premium recovery and directly resulted in the formation of a new operational department to scale up and recover premium leakage across significant portions of the block.

Along the way, I also managed the technical data implementation of a number of new insurance products, as well as changes to existing product design and features.

past.company_hq_location: South San Francisco, California, United States
past.description:
Built and scaled the finance business systems team from just me to a talented, motivated 13, made up of Program Managers, Technical Program Managers, Data Engineers, Systems Architects, and a few new managers along the way. Our areas of focus were:

* Accounting Technology, where we built the data pipelines to facilitate and sometimes automate the accounting close, support interim/annual financial audits, produce regulatory reporting, and facilitate the data side of about a dozen regulatory compliance audits
* Finance, rebuilding our Anaplan models and data integrations to provide more timely data and finer granularity for planning, budgeting, and forecasting
* All things ERP, where we implemented key corporate processes in Oracle Fusion, including account reconciliation (ARCS), consolidation (FCCS), billing (AR), procurement, and bank integrations to ingest and apply cash for billing receivables

Tech included Oracle Fusion (a cloud ERP), Anaplan, Spark, Scala, Python, Airflow.

past.description:
I led an enterprise-wide process review, delivering a significant (40%) reduction in liability investigation cycle time for a high-volume block of lower complexity claims.  In addition to leading the project, I also developed a set of reusable data collection tools to assist in process mapping and value stream analysis.

In addition, I developed data analytic capabilities within the Competitive Advantage Leadership Group, enabling other project teams to acquire information on an accurate, timely basis for their own process reviews. We also developed and deployed a number of Microstrategy-based Balanced Scorecards that utilized this data and provide executive-level views on key process and financial metrics across our large process areas.

Some other things:  Trained as Lean/Six Sigma Green Belt, Certified Microstrategy Report Developer, Certified Microstrategy Project Designer.

past.title: Senior Director, Head of Business Systems

past.description:
We're a team of software engineers, systems engineers, and technical program managers that scale Outreach by building, configuring, and maintaining the software platforms, pipelines, data, and integrations that power the business.

Our Finance and Quote to Cash Systems include Netsuite, Anaplan, Coupa, Concur, Salesforce, and Zuora. Our Customer Experience stack includes Zendesk, Maestro, Agyle Time/Playvox, and Qualtrics. We've also built a great data platform that includes things like Airflow, dbt, Snowflake, and SageMaker, built on AWS infrastructure such as ECS, EC2, and S3. This platform serves data to all people and systems at Outreach. Our services are built in Python and Go, and those include user provisioning, metered billing, and CX-focused campaign management. We feel strongly that a great corporate technology organization combines state of the art SaaS + excellent software engineering to build what can't be bought, in order to scale the enterprise. 

If you've read this far and you'd be excited to work on these sorts of things, please reach out!

Our technology was based on Oracle Application Express (APEX) with an Oracle RDBMS back end, and plenty of PL/SQL in between.  In addition to leading development and testing teams, I helped plan the project with my clients and co-led front end design.  On the firm activity side, I facilitated account team meetings and helped write a number of winning proposals to Federal agencies.  As part of those business development efforts, I did technical proposal writing, work breakdown structure, subcontractor coordination, requirements, and cost estimation.
